header.subtitleRequest: Submit a request to receive an access key for the secure portal.
header.subtitleCheck: Enter your request ID to check the status of your application.

form.name: Full Name
form.reasonPlaceholder: Briefly describe why you need access...
form.reasonPlaceholderReapply: Update your reason for requesting access...

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

form.draftRestored: We restored your previous draft so you can pick up where you left off.
form.prefillNotice: Your details have been pre-filled from your previous request. Please review and update as needed.
form.checkEmailHint: Enter your email to view messages from our team.

submitted.title: Request Submitted
submitted.subtitle: Your access key request has been submitted for review.
submitted.saveHint: Bookmark or share this link to check your request status at any time — no login required.
submitted.infoSave: Please save your Request ID or the link above. You'll need it to check your status and retrieve your access key once approved.
submitted.infoReview: Our team will review your request and may send you messages if additional information is needed.

status.underReviewDesc: Our team is reviewing your request
status.name: Name
status.enterKeyHint: Your access key has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox and use it to log in to the secure portal.
status.noReason: No specific reason was provided by our team.
status.rejectedHelp: If you believe this was an error or your circumstances have changed, you're welcome to submit a new request.
status.expiredHelp: This request has expired. You can submit a new access key request — your details will be pre-filled for convenience.
status.pendingHelp: Your request is being reviewed by our team. You'll receive updates here. Processing typically takes 1–3 business days.

footer.encryption: Access key requests are reviewed by our security team. Processing typically takes 1-3 business days.

toast.copyDesc: Please copy the link manually from the box above.
toast.submittedDesc: Your access key request has been submitted for review.
toast.connectionDesc: Unable to submit request. Please try again later.
toast.notFoundDesc: Request ID not found. Please check and try again.
toast.checkErrorDesc: Unable to check status. Please try again later.
toast.messagesReadDesc: Your team messages are marked as read.
